metadata.label: extra/Dataminr-Infra
metadata.title: Senior Software Engineer, Backend
metadata.team_direction: Dataminr is a mission-driven company that provides organizations with AI-powered intelligence to respond to emerging risks and events

official_notes: No recovered historical Claude-vs-official target baseline; used only for old-pipe vs new-pipe Codex comparison.

findings.issue: The 3 summary bullets start as noun phrases / descriptive labels rather than strong-verb bullets.
findings.fix: Rewrite each summary bullet so the lead text is verb-led or role-led, while keeping the required 3-sentence structure.

findings.issue: Key quantitative signals are not bolded in the body, including values such as 28%, 19%, 31%, 13-person, 11 hours, and 4 hours.
findings.fix: Bold the strongest scope/result numbers in each role and project so the metrics become visual anchors.

findings.issue: Multiple qualifier words are bolded, such as team-maintained, existing, internal, team-owned, and shared.
findings.fix: Keep bolding for core technologies and key metrics only; remove bold from modifiers and ownership adjectives.

findings.issue: This Skills line is too dense for the stated 14-word cap.
findings.fix: Split the line into a shorter category row or reduce the listed terms so the full line stays within the cap.

findings.issue: This Skills line is too dense for the stated 14-word cap.
findings.fix: Split the line into a shorter category row or reduce the listed terms so the full line stays within the cap.

findings.issue: This Skills line is too dense for the stated 14-word cap.
findings.fix: Split the line into a shorter category row or reduce the listed terms so the full line stays within the cap.

findings.issue: The header Structured Problem Solver is readable but generic, so it weakens the cognition signal on the first screen.
findings.fix: Replace it with a more specific cognition header such as Systems judgment, Decision-making, or Pattern recognition.

findings.issue: The latest role is dominated by percentage lifts and time reductions, but it lacks a Tier 1 scope anchor such as request volume, data volume, SLA, or team size.
findings.fix: Add one concrete scope or ownership signal to the most relevant TikTok bullet, ideally in the first bullet, so the role reads as more than a collection of incremental improvements.

revision_priority: [SHOULD] Compress the Skills section into 3 short category rows that stay within the line-word cap.
[SHOULD] Add one Tier 1 scope metric to the TikTok first bullet so the latest role has a clear scale anchor.
[SHOULD] Rewrite the third Summary header into a stronger cognition label and make the Summary bullets more verb-led.
[NICE] Remove bold from qualifiers and reserve bold for the strongest metrics and core technologies.
